s: A game similar to the board game ricochet robots.
d:
Are you a fan of the captivating board game ricochet robots? If so, we're excited to introduce its digital counterpart!

In this game, your objective mirrors the icy puzzle challenges found in Pokémon gyms: navigate your player across the board, moving in straight lines until you encounter a wall. The key is to reach the designated goal, ideally in the fewest possible moves for those seeking an extra challenge.

Currently, the game features an endless loop where you can attempt to achieve goals without a move limit.
